channel.title: Work Experience on britney-wang
channel.description: Recent content in Work Experience on britney-wang

item.title: Associate Software Engineer @ Canonical
item.description:
• Implemented dark theme components, integrated on Ubuntu Pro Support Portal for dual theme support
  • Upstreamed themed components on the Vanilla Framework
  • Added support ticket and comment features through SalesForce API and Chatter

item.title: Developer Intern @ Configura
item.description:
• Developed a constraint-solver algorithm with linear programming practices to improve CET Designer’s UI/UX using in-house language, Configura Magick (CM)
  • Collaborated with the QA team to complete on-call tasks and regression testing on CET minor build versions using Jira and Test Rails

item.title: Software Engineer I @ Canonical
item.description:
• Shipped open source tools i.e directory parser, cookie policy that are used across Sites
  • Automated testing for Python, Javascript and Marketo forms to reduce lead loss
  • Implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions including automated sitemap generation and form generator
  • Integrated TIOBE index tracking for codebase quality monitoring
  • Developed Jinja2 macro-based templating system to improve DevX on page creation
  • Mentored junior engineers on development best practices
  • Chair of Social Working Group, organising programmes that support team cohesion and social impact across 60+ distributed team members
  • 3x Recognition Award recipient

item.title: Software Engineer Intern @ PostCo
item.description:
• Developed features to the existing web application checkout page using React, TypeScript and Ruby on Rails
  • Collaborated with the Operations team to query Darkstores orders with SQL and Airtable
